Integrations.subtitle: Connect Everything
Integrations.title: Seamless integrations with the tools you already use.
Integrations.desc: Connect your store to local carriers, payment processors, and social media with just one click.

Features.subtitle: One Platform, 7 Powerful Tools
Features.title: Everything you need to grow your e-commerce business at scale.
Features.crmDesc: Know your customers and their history.

HowItWorks.subtitle: The Process
HowItWorks.title: Your journey to automation in 4 simple steps.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Link Shopify, WooCommerce, or your social pages to EcoMate.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Train your AI on products in seconds and go live.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: AI handles chats, confirms orders, syncs to dashboard.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Print labels, track delivery, and see your profit grow.

DashboardPreview.subtitle: Powerful Management
DashboardPreview.title: Control your entire empire from a single dashboard.
DashboardPreview.desc: Real-time tracking of every conversation, every order, and every Dinar. Built for teams of 1 to 50.

AI.subtitle: AI-Powered Core
AI.title: Your store sells while you sleep.
AI.desc: Our AI handles the full customer journey — product discovery, order confirmation, and delivery tracking — automatically in Arabic, French, and English.
AI.platformsDesc: Messenger, Instagram DM, WhatsApp, and more — wherever your customers are.
AI.shoppingDesc: Customers browse products, pick options, and order — all within the conversation.
AI.orderDesc: Every order logged instantly to your dashboard and Google Sheets.
AI.trackingDesc: Integrates with all Algerian delivery companies.

Pricing.subtitle: Transparent Pricing
Pricing.title: Plans that scale with you.
Pricing.desc: No hidden fees. No contracts. Start free for 14 days.

CTA.title: Ready to build your digital business?
CTA.desc: Join Algerian merchants already automating their sales. Seven powerful tools. One platform. Zero complexity.
CTA.builtAt: Built at University of Bouira Startup Incubator · 🇩🇿 Made in Algeria

Footer.slogan: The all-in-one SaaS platform helping Algerian SMEs build automated, scalable digital businesses.
